project_type: AWS CDK Python application (cdk init skeleton)
build_system: pip with requirements.txt and requirements-dev.txt, CDK CLI for synth/deploy
verification_instructions:
1. pip install -r requirements.txt -r requirements-dev.txt
2. NODE_OPTIONS='' pytest tests/
3. NODE_OPTIONS='' python3 app.py (cdk synth equivalent)
setup_instructions: pyenv global 3.11.15 && pip install -r requirements.txt -r requirements-dev.txt
environment_constraints: NODE_OPTIONS env var must be cleared (set to empty string) before running any command that uses Node.js (jsii/CDK). The sandbox has NODE_OPTIONS='--require /opt/amazon/kiro-agent/proxy-bootstrap.js' which breaks jsii. CDK CLI is not installed - use 'npx cdk' or install via npm. Network mode is COMMON_DEPENDENCIES so pip/npm installs work fine.
contribution_requirements: TDD-first approach: write failing tests before implementation. Use fine-grained assertions on synthesized CloudFormation templates.
key_patterns: Stack defined in cdk_base/cdk_base_stack.py, tests in tests/unit/test_cdk_base_stack.py, entry point is app.py which instantiates CdkBaseStack. Test pattern uses aws_cdk.assertions.Template.from_stack(stack).
directory_structure: Root: app.py (CDK entry), cdk.json (CDK config), requirements*.txt (deps). cdk_base/: stack module with CdkBaseStack class. tests/unit/: pytest tests using aws_cdk.assertions.
